en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Spain Trade Licenses Applicability Assessment
Ministry of Industry, Trade and Tourism Royal Decree 809/2021\n
Does your company perform Installation or Maintenance of Pressure Equipment in Spain and is required to maintain a Certificate of Authorization for Installation and Maintenance of Pressure Equipment?
Yes
No

Yes
No
